untranslatable_reason: Fibonacci retracement levels (38%, 50%, 62%) require dynamic calculation based on swing high/low identification within a lookback period. These calculations (trend_height = high - low; fib_level_38 = low + trend_height × 0.38; etc.) are not available as pre-calculated indicators in the allowed indicator set. The signal requires custom indicator computation or a dedicated Fibonacci retracement module not present in the allowed indicators list.
translation_notes: Pattern identifies potential turning points at Fibonacci retracement levels. Signal is context-dependent as it can trigger both long and short entries depending on price direction relative to the three calculated levels (38%, 50%, 62%). Original source confirms calculation method: (high - low) × percentage + low. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT were inferred as reversal beyond the retracement band.
